title: Kenyan Deodeok Skewers
description: A flavorful and healthy Kenyan-inspired snack with deodeok root, marinated in a tangy and spicy sauce, served on crispy skewers.

ingredients.name: Kenyan spices
ingredients.notes: a blend of turmeric, cumin, coriander, and chili powder

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together tangy sauce, kenyan spices, and lime juice.
3. Add the deodeok root pieces to the bowl and toss to coat.
4. Thread 3-4 pieces of deodeok root onto each skewer.
5. Brush the skewers with olive oil.
6. Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the deodeok is tender and lightly caramelized.
8. Serve hot with additional tangy sauce for dipping.
